title: Global typography refresh: modern web font, higher-contrast tokens, and improved font rendering

requirements.summary: Load a modern sans-serif web font and apply it globally across all views (Login, Calendar, Daily, Settings).
acceptanceCriteria: A web font is loaded from a reliable source (e.g., via a <link> in frontend/index.html) and applied globally (e.g., on body/html) without breaking layout.
Text across the app (headings, paragraphs, buttons, inputs) renders in the new font on refresh.
No user-facing strings are changed; only typography styling changes.

file_operations.description: Add a reliable web-font <link> (and any required preconnects) in the document <head> so the font loads on first paint across the app.

Apply the new font globally via document/body-level font-family (and optionally a CSS variable) so all text (including shadcn/ui components without modifying frontend/src/components/ui) uses the new font consistently.
Configure Tailwind's default sans font stack to include the new web font so existing Tailwind typography utilities continue to map to the new font across the app.

requirements.summary: Increase text contrast by adjusting global text color tokens for foreground, muted-foreground, and card-foreground in light and dark themes.
acceptanceCriteria: In light theme, general body text and UI labels appear darker/clearer (higher contrast) on light card/background surfaces.
In dark theme, general body text and UI labels remain bright and readable on dark card/background surfaces.
Muted text (e.g., text-muted-foreground used in descriptions and helper text) is still visually secondary but noticeably more legible than before.
LoginScreen informational paragraphs (currently using text-muted-foreground) remain readable against the background image and glass-card styling.
Calendar weekday headers (text-muted-foreground) and task controls/icons using muted text remain readable.

file_operations.description: Tune the OKLCH theme tokens for --foreground, --muted-foreground, and --card-foreground (and their .dark equivalents) to improve perceived brightness/legibility on glassmorphism cards and over background-image overlays, without changing layouts, copy, or behavior.

requirements.summary: Add global font-rendering enhancements (smoothing/kerning) to improve perceived text clarity without affecting app behavior or animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Global CSS includes font rendering improvements (e.g., antialiasing/font-smoothing) applied at the document/body level.
No changes to planner data, LocalStorage logic, authentication flow, routing, or animations occur as a result of the typography changes.

file_operations.description: Add document/body-level font-rendering enhancements (e.g., -webkit-font-smoothing, -moz-osx-font-smoothing, text-rendering) to improve clarity while keeping all existing animations and application logic unchanged.
